name: @dvai-bridge/dotnet
description: Local-LLM bridge with OpenAI-compatible HTTP server for .NET MAUI / Avalonia / WinUI on iOS + Android. Wraps the @dvai-bridge/ios + @dvai-bridge/android native SDKs behind an idiomatic C# API. Published to NuGet.org as DVAIBridge + DVAIBridge.iOS + DVAIBridge.Android.
author: Deep Chakraborty <https://github.com/dk013>
